logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "payload": payload, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { appName: "Amazon Bedrock (Titan Embedding)", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default "CONNECTIVITY", errorMessage: error.errorMessage.payload.value default error.detailedDescription, correlationId: vars.correlationId default correlationId default uuid(), timestamp: ((now() >> "UTC") as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss" }) }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "payload": payload, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { appName: "Amazon Bedrock (Claude)", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default "CONNECTIVITY", errorMessage: error.errorMessage.payload.value default error.detailedDescription, correlationId: vars.correlationId default correlationId default uuid(), timestamp: ((now() >> "UTC") as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss" }) }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
